Sweet and Sour Straps for the Win!

TNT Sour Straps are like no other snack. They come in an array of vibrant colors and flavors that are sure to make your taste buds tingle. No matter what mood you're in, TNT Sour Straps are sure to satisfy your craving for something sweet and sour.
